title: draba verna var. procerula
intro: Draba verna var. procerula, a lesser-known variant of the Draba verna plant, is a small, annual or biennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Draba verna var. procerula include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusion, tincture, or salve, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
